issuer_name_as_stated: Seshaasai Technologies Limited (formerly known as Seshaasai Business Forms Limited)
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table lists only “Against the Company” criminal proceedings as Nil, “Against the Company” tax proceedings as 22, and no statutory/regulatory proceedings; the “By the Company,” directors’ and promoters’ rows are excluded, while director/promoter personal tax matters are excluded from the company-group tax count. The quantified amount against the company is ₹138.27 million; no separate subsidiary amount is disclosed, so this converts to ₹13.827 crore (138.27 ÷ 10). The contingent-liabilities table is dated March 31, 2025 and lists income-tax and indirect-tax amounts but does not state a Total row, so the contingent-liabilities total is not extracted under the stated-total rule. Top-five and top-ten customer concentration is company-wide for Fiscal 2025, measured as a percentage of revenue from operations: 49.12% and 65.77%, respectively. The source tables use ₹ million; monetary amounts reported in crore are converted at 1 crore = ₹10 million.
